headline: Assessing FedEx (FDX) Valuation As Freight Spin Off And Earnings Catalysts Draw Investor Focus
summary: FedEx (FDX) is drawing fresh attention as the company prepares to spin off its FedEx Freight business on June 1. The move coincides with upcoming quarterly earnings and renewed debate over the stock. See our latest analysis for FedEx. FedEx’s share price has recently picked up momentum, with a 1-day share price return of 2.94% and a year to date share price return of 40.48%, while the 1-year total shareholder return of 93.84% and 3-year total shareholder return of 101.19% underline how...

headline: 1 Profitable Stock with Impressive Fundamentals and 2 Facing Challenges
summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies — as Jeff Bezos said, “Your margin is my opportunity”.

headline: Nordic American Tankers (NAT) Surpasses Q1 Earnings Estimates
summary: Nordic American Tankers (NAT) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +6.25% and -3.88%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: 'It's Gung-Ho, Folks' - Dimon Lets Loose While the Chip Rally Catches Its Breath and AI Earnings Deliver the Real Verdict
summary: Wednesday on Wall Street was one of those days where the session itself was a placeholder, calm on the surface, with almost everyone positioning ahead of a heavy after-hours earnings slate.

headline: FedEx Spin-Off Gets Rare S&P 500 Fast Pass As Freight Unit Prepares To Trade
summary: FedEx will spin off FedEx Freight as an independent company on June 1, and the new business will quickly join the S&P 500 index.

raw.headline: FedEx Spin-Off Gets Rare S&P 500 Fast Pass As Freight Unit Prepares To Trade
raw.summary: FedEx will spin off FedEx Freight as an independent company on June 1, and the new business will quickly join the S&P 500 index.

headline: FedEx Freight Holding Set to Join Dow Jones Transportation Average
summary: FedEx Freight Holding Company Inc. (NYSE:FDXF) will replace American Airlines Group Inc. (NASD:AAL) in the Dow Jones Transportation Average (DJTA) effective prior to the open of trading on Monday, June, 1, 2026. Dow Jones Transportation Average constituent FedEx Corp. (NYSE:FDX) is spinning off FedEx Freight Holding Company in a transaction expected to be completed on June 1. Post spin-off, parent FedEx will remain in the DJTA.
